description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows Installer that runs on pushes to master, develop, and actions_shared branches, as well as tags matching v*. It also triggers on pull requests to master and develop. The workflow should run on a windows-latest environment, check out the repository with submodules, install Python dependencies, extract the CoolProp version, configure and build with CMake, create a zip archive of the Windows installer, and upload it as an artifact and to a release if a tag is pushed.
